LightningComponentBundle.description: Allows searching across multiple objects in Flow screens. Supports single and multi-select modes.

property.name: iconNames
property.label: Icon Names (CSV)
property.description: Comma-separated list corresponding to objects (e.g., standard:account,standard:contact)

property.name: subtitleFields
property.label: Subtitle Fields (CSV)
property.description: Comma-separated list of fields to show under the name (e.g., BillingCity,Email)

property.name: filterJson
property.label: Filter Configuration (JSON)
property.description: JSON Object mapping API Names to WHERE clauses. Example: {"Account": "BillingCity = 'New York'"}

property.name: showCreate
property.label: Show New Record Option
property.description: Shows a 'New {Object}' option in the search dropdown

property.name: dropdownLimit
property.label: Dropdown Result Limit
property.description: Max records shown in the inline dropdown

property.name: modalLimit
property.label: Modal Result Limit
property.description: Max records shown in the Show All modal

property.name: placeholder
property.label: Placeholder Text
property.description: Overrides the default placeholder (e.g., Search Accounts...)

property.name: allowCrossObjectSelection
property.label: Allow Cross-Object Selection
property.description: When multi-select is on, allows selecting records from different object types. When false, object switcher locks after first selection.

property.name: maxSelections
property.label: Maximum Selections
property.description: Caps the number of records that can be selected. Leave blank for unlimited.

property.name: selectedRecordIds
property.label: Output: Selected Record IDs (CSV)
property.description: Comma-separated list of selected record IDs. Use a Loop or custom Apex to split.

property.name: selectedObjectTypes
property.label: Output: Selected Object Types (CSV)
property.description: Comma-separated list of object API names, parallel to selectedRecordIds.
